Interface IProximityOperator

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geometry
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geometry.dll

Provides access to members that find the 2D distance between two geometries.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("1B07790F-38C5-11D0-92D2-00805F7C28B0")]
public interface IProximityOperator
